Welcome to Ruchy Aesthetics

Look

Premium lash extensions, brow sculpting, and semi-permanent tattoos in Yenagoa.

Book on WhatsApp View Our Work

Crafted with Precision

At Ruchy Aesthetics, we believe beauty is in the details. Located in the heart of Yenagoa, our studio is dedicated to enhancing your natural features.

From voluminous lash sets that open up your eyes, to perfectly sculpted brows that frame your face, and delicate semi-permanent tattoos that tell your story—we bring your vision to life with skill and care.

Expert Application

Safe, clean, and comfortable

Custom Designs

Tailored to your style

What We Do

Our Services

From clean lash enhancement to defined brows and statement details, every service is delivered with a soft luxury finish.

Lash Extensions

Classic, Hybrid, and Volume sets. Customized to your eye shape for a flawless, waking-up-gorgeous look.

See Lashes

Brows

Shaping, tinting, and lamination. We create the perfect arch to frame your face and enhance your expressions.

See Brows

Semi-Permanent Tattoos

Delicate script and fine-line art. Express yourself with meaningful, lasting body art in a sterile environment.

See Tattoos

A polished collection of lash sets, brows, strip lashes, and semi-permanent tattoo work designed to show the finish, detail, and beauty of every appointment.
